uplink.description: Short periodic keepalive, no flood (leak=false), box tamper set
uplink._note: byte0=8 (00001000): reason keepalive, boxTamper bit set, flood clear. battery 201*16/1000=3.216 V. Expected produced by the oracle method from reference/upstream-codec.js, then normalized.

uplink.description: Long flood-detected uplink (leak=true) with device temperature
uplink._note: byte0=66 (01000010): reason floodDetected, boxTamper clear, flood set. battery 180*16/1000=2.88 V; temperature byte=22 C. Expected produced by the oracle method from reference/upstream-codec.js, then normalized.
Below the 2-byte minimum frame; codec returns an error.
